name: Summoning arms a spellbook and spends gold
description: Clicking SUMMON adds a Lv1 book (auto-equipped). Cost arithmetic is engine unit-test territory (46 tests); idle combat income makes any E2E gold assertion racy.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game with the URL path /?fresh=1 (this starts a brand-new save) and wait for the game HUD showing GOLD to load
Verify all six equip slots are empty (fresh save)
Verify a book with a Lv1 badge appeared in the first equip slot (summons auto-equip into empty slots)
Click the SUMMON button once more
Verify a second book now occupies another equip slot
